articles.title: Big Pharma's War on Hemp: How DuPont and the Deep State Criminalized Nature's Medicine
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically outlawed in 1937 not for health reasons, but because synthetic fiber giants like DuPont saw it as competition. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act then falsely classified hemp as Schedule I with 'no accepted medical use' — a deliberate lie to protect pharmaceutical profits.

articles.title: Turmeric Blackout: Why Big Pharma Can't Patent Nature's Anti-Inflammatory Powerhouse
articles.summary: Turmeric's curcuminoids target multiple disease pathways simultaneously with supreme anti-inflammatory efficacy, but the medical-pharmaceutical complex actively suppresses and dismisses it. The reason is simple: natural compounds can't be patented for massive profits.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Muscle-Wasting Crisis: What Pharma Doesn't Want You to Know
articles.summary: New research reveals Ozempic's devastating impact on muscle health, but mainstream medicine downplays these serious side effects while pushing the diabetes drug for weight loss. The muscle wasting could have long-term metabolic consequences being systematically ignored.

articles.title: Russell Vought's War on Science: OMB's Proposed Rule Would Destroy Independent Research
